profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: My account and permissions
profile.permissionsSubtitle: Which sections you can access and what you can do
profile.editTipBody: Only a SUPERADMIN can change your name or role from the admin users page. Contact an admin to change your password.
profile.securityBody: Your account is protected. Contact an administrator to request a password change.

deploy.newVersionDesc: The system has been updated. Refresh the page to use new features and fixes.
deploy.failedDesc: New version was not deployed. The old version continues to work. Contact administrator.
deploy.newVersionHint: Refresh the page — new features are ready

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.subtitle: Users, roles, sync and API management

adminLogin.title: Login issues
adminLogin.subtitle: Banks whose passwords changed or returned auth errors — update them here
adminLogin.allGoodBody: No banks are reporting login errors right now. If a bank's password changes, it will appear here.
adminLogin.summaryHint: Enter the new password — it will be tested immediately
adminLogin.updatePasswordDesc: New password for {bank} — will be tested and applied to all linked accounts.
adminLogin.updateHint: After saving, testConnection is called automatically. If the test succeeds — the bank is removed from this list.
adminLogin.testFailedAfterSave: Password saved, but connection test failed. Please verify the password.

cleanup.title: Delete transactions by account number
cleanup.subtitle: Data cleanup
cleanup.intro: All transactions for the given account number and their linked Payment records will be deleted from the database.
cleanup.warningBody: Transactions will be permanently deleted. The account itself stays — the next sync will reload data (balance will recover). Matched payment links (Payment) are also removed.
cleanup.confirmLabel: Confirm — retype the account number above
cleanup.confirmMismatch: Confirmation does not match the account number
cleanup.confirmDialog: Really delete all transactions for account {accountNo}?
cleanup.deniedBody: This section is for SUPERADMIN only. Your role: {role}.
cleanup.item1: All transactions for the selected account (Transaction rows)
cleanup.item2: Payment records linked to those transactions
cleanup.item3Keep: The account number itself stays — next sync restores its balance
cleanup.safetyTip: This action is for SUPERADMIN only. The button stays disabled until the confirmation text matches — that saves you from mistakes.
cleanup.confirmDesc: The following data will be permanently removed from the database

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Clients — bank transactions auto-match by INN
customers.name: Name
customers.search: Search by name, INN or phone

contracts.title: Contracts
contracts.subtitle: Customer contracts with payment stages
contracts.sumMismatch: Stages sum does not equal contract total

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: {accounts} accounts · {banks} banks · last update: {lastSync}
dashboard.barChart: Daily bar chart — inflow / outflow / transaction count
dashboard.debitorDesc: In XonPay but not received in Kapital bank

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: All payment records from banks
transactions.searchPlaceholder: Sender, receiver, TIN, description, contract no., ID...
transactions.noDataYet: No transactions yet. They will appear after sync runs.
transactions.idDialogDesc: Enter the full transaction ID — if found, the detail dialog will open
transactions.idNotFound: No transaction found with that ID
transactions.manualContractDesc: CRM not checked — user is responsible. Specify counterparty and contract number.
transactions.manualContractWarning: This contract is not verified in CRM — you confirm its correctness
transactions.aiAssistantTitle: AI assistant — today's statistics and actions
transactions.aloqaBankReadOnly: Transaction from Aloqa Bank Excel source — read-only. Category, contract, application and other edits are blocked. Deletion is only possible from batch history.
transactions.editPanelHintNoCategory: Auto-detect by rules or enter manually
transactions.manualContractBtnTitle: Enter contract number manually (no CRM check)
transactions.historyEmpty: No history — no one has categorized yet
transactions.backfillFormDesc: Transactions for the selected period will be fetched from the bank into the database
transactions.backfillRunningDesc: Process is running — it continues in the background even if you close the window
transactions.backfillStalledDesc: The process appears to have stalled
transactions.backfillClampedWarning: Due to the sync limit ({date}), {days} days were skipped.
transactions.backfillClampedHint: Change the limit in settings and try again.
transactions.backfillClampedAll: Selected range is entirely before the sync limit ({date}) — change the limit in Sync settings
transactions.backfillStalledBody: The server may have restarted. {done} / {total} accounts done. If you restart — the rest will load (already loaded accounts are not duplicated, only checked).
transactions.backfillBigRangeHint: A large range + many accounts will take a while. Once started, the process is shown here live.
transactions.recatRunningDesc: Transactions are being categorized automatically. The process continues in the background even if you close the window.
transactions.recatFinishedBody: {matched} transactions categorized ({skipped} unchanged, did not match a rule)
transactions.aiContractFindDesc: AI-analyzed options for a contract not found in CRM
transactions.aiFioNotFound: Full name not found in description
transactions.aiCrmNotFoundConfirm: Not found in CRM — confirm from the similar ones below
transactions.aiConfirmWithClient: Use this list to confirm with the client
transactions.combinedEditDesc: First select Counterparty, then Category. For a client, Contract also appears.
transactions.orFindSpecialCounterparty: Or find a specific counterparty (company name/INN):
transactions.noSubcategory: No subcategory for {name} — only the top category is saved
transactions.crmNotFoundInvalid: Not found in CRM — this number cannot be saved
transactions.confirmDeleteApplication: Confirm deleting the application? This action cannot be undone.
transactions.applicationFixDesc: To correct a transaction by attaching the client's application. Every change is sent to Telegram.
transactions.applicationReplaceHint: To add a new application, first delete the existing one and attach again.
transactions.crmNotCheckedManual: CRM is not checked — marked as manually entered
transactions.selectCategoryDesc: If you select a subcategory directly, the parent category is set automatically
transactions.todayIncomePercent: {pct}% of today's inflow is home payments

counterparties.title: Counterparties
counterparties.subtitle: Counterparty registry — data is auto-fetched from DIDOX by INN
counterparties.search: Search by INN, name, director or phone
counterparties.namePlaceholder: Name (will be kept as you enter)
counterparties.innHint: All other data is fetched from DIDOX by INN. Your name is never overwritten.
counterparties.didoxNotConfigured: DIDOX env vars not configured — only INN and Name will be stored on add
counterparties.importHint: Column A — INN, column B — name. First row is header (skipped). Duplicate INNs are skipped.

crm.searchHint: Enter a contract number and press Enter

statement.title: Statement

statement.searchAccount: Search by account, owner or MFO...
statement.selectBankFirst: Select a bank on the left first

check.title: Reconciliation
check.subtitle: Match bank balance against system records
check.loadingSubtitle: Comparing today's inflow/outflow between the bank and AllTranzactions for each account. This takes a few seconds.

common.accessDenied: You don't have access to this page
common.accessDeniedDesc: The required permission is not granted to your role. If you think this is an error, contact the system administrator.

onboarding.title: Getting started guide
onboarding.step1Desc: Enter the login and password for KapitalBank or Ipak Yo'li
onboarding.step2Desc: Enter the 20-digit account numbers issued by the bank
onboarding.step3Desc: Transactions are loaded automatically every 5 minutes

pomodoro.focusComplete: {min} min of focus done! Now {breakMin} min break

idInspector.excelHintLine1: In the Excel file, IDs should be in column A (each row a separate ID).
idInspector.excelHintLine2: The first row may be a header — detected automatically.
idInspector.noRowsForStatus: No rows found for this status
idInspector.noIdInColumnA: No ID found in column A

vipiskaDebug.title: Statement check
vipiskaDebug.description: Check via bank API the transactions present in the statement Excel but missing in the DB (not written to DB)
vipiskaDebug.noRowsInBank: No such row found in Bank API
vipiskaDebug.mismatch: Statement Excel and Bank API data may not match

billing.title: Billing
billing.cleanupOrphans: Clean up orphan records (not in CRM)
billing.clickDayHint: Click to view this day separately
billing.noDataSyncHint: No data. Click the Sync from CRM button above.
billing.detailDescMatched: The CRM XonPay payment was successfully received in Kapitalbank
billing.detailDescUnmatched: The CRM XonPay payment was not yet found in Kapitalbank
billing.notFoundInCapitalDesc: This payment was sent from XonPay but has not yet arrived in our bank accounts (or the UUID did not match). Recheck with the Check button above.
billing.matchRunningDesc: Searching Kapitalbank tx for unmatched XonPay payments (by UUID)
billing.syncInfoBackground: Sync continues in the background. Even if this window is closed, sync will not stop.
billing.syncInfoSkip: Days with 100% match are automatically skipped
billing.cleanupDesc: Fully clears the table (TRUNCATE). Linked bank tx are not affected.
billing.cleanupWarning: All XonpayTransaction records (approximately ~19k) will be completely deleted. Linked Transactions (bank tx) are preserved, only the matched_tx_id link is removed.
billing.cleanupRefillHint: After cleanup you can refill by clicking the "Sync from CRM" button (it does not start automatically).
billing.confirmDeleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. Click "Yes, delete" to confirm.
billing.cleanupDoneHint: Now click the "Sync from CRM" button to refill.

oplatykv.subtitle: Apartment payments · CRM and bank reconciliation
oplatykv.aktSverkaTitle: Akt Sverka — payment history by contract
oplatykv.crmNotFoundFixTx: Not found in CRM — fix in the transaction (manual or application)
oplatykv.arizaBadgeTitle: Entered via application in the transaction (document attached)
oplatykv.manualBadgeTitle: Entered manually in the transaction (CRM unverified)
oplatykv.aktSverceHeroSubtitle: Select a contract number — all payments will be shown
oplatykv.selectContractHint: Enter the contract number in the field above or pick from the list
oplatykv.noPaymentsForContract: No payments found for this contract
oplatykv.crmNotFoundFixTitle: NOT FOUND in CRM — fix in the transaction
oplatykv.crmNotFoundShort: Not found in CRM — fix in the transaction
oplatykv.crmNotFoundFillManual: Not found in CRM — fill in manually
oplatykv.crmFoundFilled: Found in CRM · data filled in
oplatykv.sumMustEqual: 1 взнос + ежемесячный must equal Сумма оплаты
oplatykv.formDesc: ОплатыКв table · every change is automatically logged to history.
oplatykv.lockedFieldsBanner: — the Дог №, Дата, Сумма оплаты, Клиент, Назначение fields cannot be edited. You can change the rest.
oplatykv.lockedFieldTitle: From the bank — cannot be edited
oplatykv.deleteConfirmDesc: The row below will be permanently deleted. The history record remains.
oplatykv.perereboskaDeleteWarning: This row belongs to a Переброска group — the entire group (source + all destinations) will be deleted and a Telegram notification sent.
oplatykv.whichRecordType: Which type of record do we add?
oplatykv.addChoiceDesc: Regular payment or money transfer between contracts (Переброска)
oplatykv.regularPaymentDesc: Manually enter payment data for a single contract. CRM check is automatic.
oplatykv.perereboskaCardDesc: Money transfer from one contract to another(s). Object names must match, document is required.
oplatykv.perereboskaSaved: Переброска saved and sent to Telegram
oplatykv.perereboskaHeroDesc: Transfer money from one contract to another(s). Object names must match · Document required
oplatykv.selectSourceFirst: First select the source contract (where the object name comes from)
oplatykv.selfTransferDesc: is the source contract — you cannot add it to the destination list. Enter a different contract number.
oplatykv.duplicateDestDesc: already exists above — each contract only once.
oplatykv.objectMismatchHint: — transfer is only possible between the same object
oplatykv.footerSelfTransfer: ⚠ Source contract is in the destination list — self-transfer is not allowed
oplatykv.footerSumMismatch: ⚠ Destination amounts do not equal the source
